_meta.description: Machine-readable index of all APIA manifests. Search by id, category, geo, or intent.

manifests.name: 2GIS
manifests.description_for_ai: Справочник организаций и карты России и СНГ. Лучший источник для поиска компаний, магазинов, кафе, аптек, банков рядом с пользователем. Содержит часы работы, телефоны, рейтинги. Особенно силён в регионах России где Google Maps слабее.
manifests.cost: демо-ключ бесплатно на месяц, далее по тарифу

agent_hints.geo_flow: Всегда передавай координаты пользователя в point='lng,lat' и sort=distance — результаты будут отсортированы по близости.
agent_hints.schedule_tip: Чтобы получить часы работы добавь fields=items.schedule. Без этого поля расписание не возвращается.
agent_hints.coords_format: 2GIS использует формат 'longitude,latitude' (сначала долгота) — это отличается от стандарта lat,lng. Не перепутай!
agent_hints.regions: 2GIS особенно хорош в регионах России — Сибирь, Урал, Дальний Восток — где другие карты менее полны.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Поиск организаций и мест по запросу рядом с координатами. Основной метод для запросов 'найди аптеку рядом', 'кафе поблизости', 'банкомат рядом со мной', 'магазины в этом районе'. Возвращает название, адрес, часы работы, телефон.
Прямое и обратное геокодирование. Прямое: адрес → координаты. Обратное: координаты → адрес. Используй когда нужно определить адрес по координатам пользователя или найти координаты по названию улицы.
Автодополнение поискового запроса. Используй для подсказок когда пользователь вводит название организации или адрес — возвращает список вариантов.
Полная информация об организации по её ID. Используй после search_places когда пользователь хочет подробности: все телефоны, полное расписание, сайт, описание.

manifests.name: 2GIS — Беларусь, Казахстан и другие страны
manifests.description_for_ai: 2GIS работает не только в России, но и в Беларуси, Казахстане, Кыргызстане, Узбекистане, ОАЭ, Чили, Италии, Кипре. API идентично российскому 2GIS — те же endpoints, тот же ключ. Используй когда пользователь ищет организации в этих странах.

agent_hints.same_api: API идентично российскому 2GIS. Один ключ, одни endpoints — просто другие координаты.
agent_hints.language: Для Беларуси и Казахстана используй locale=ru_RU. Данные на русском языке.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Поиск организаций в Беларуси по координатам. Используй для запросов 'аптека в Минске', 'кафе рядом в Гомеле', 'банк в Беларуси'.
Поиск организаций в Казахстане по координатам. Используй для запросов 'аптека в Алматы', 'кафе в Астане', 'банк в Казахстане'.

manifests.name: Abstract API
manifests.description_for_ai: Collection of 20+ utility APIs in one platform: email validation, phone validation, IP geolocation, holidays, timezone, VAT validation, currency exchange, company enrichment. Free tier on each.
manifests.cost: Free: 100-500 req/month per API. Paid from $9/month

capabilities.description_for_ai: Validate email address deliverability: checks format, domain MX records, SMTP connection, and detects disposable/role emails. Returns quality score 0-1.
Validate phone number and get carrier, country, line type (mobile/landline/VoIP), and E.164 formatted number.
Get public holidays for any country and year with local names, holiday types, and whether they affect business hours.

manifests.name: Adyen API
manifests.description_for_ai: Adyen — enterprise global payments platform processing $1T+ annually. Accepts 200+ payment methods across 40 currencies in 70+ countries. Used by Uber, Microsoft, Spotify, McDonald's, Airbnb. Unified commerce: online, mobile, in-store. Advanced fraud prevention included.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Enterprise global payments platform. Used by Uber, Spotify, Microsoft, McDonald. 200+ payment methods, 40+ currencies. Unified commerce across online, mobile, POS. Use for large-scale global payment processing. Process payment with card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, local payment methods. Enterprise-grade checkout.

manifests.name: Airbnb API
manifests.description_for_ai: Vacation rental and short-term accommodation platform. 7M+ listings in 220+ countries. Unique stays: houses, apartments, villas, treehouses. Official API very restricted — primarily for property managers and analytics partners.

agent_hints.alternative: For public Airbnb data consider RapidAPI scrapers or AirDNA for analytics. Official API is very restricted.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Vacation rental and short-term accommodation platform. 7M+ listings in 220+ countries. Unique stays: houses, apartments, villas, treehouses. Official API very restricted — primarily for property managers and analytics partners. Get listing details: description, photos, price, availability, reviews, host info.

manifests.name: Airtable API
manifests.description_for_ai: Flexible database-spreadsheet hybrid. Tables, records, views, formulas, attachments. 300K+ companies use it. Use for data management, project tracking, CRM-lite, content calendars, inventory.

agent_hints.base_id: Get base ID from Airtable URL: airtable.com/{BASE_ID}/..., looks like 'appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX'
agent_hints.token: Create token at airtable.com/create/tokens. Scope: data.records:read, data.records:write
agent_hints.formula: filterByFormula supports Airtable formula syntax: {Status}='Active', AND({Price}>100, {Stock}>0)
agent_hints.pagination: Use offset token from response for next page. Max 100 records per request.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get records from an Airtable table with optional filters, sorts, and field selection. Perfect for reading database entries.
Create a new record in an Airtable table with field values.

manifests.name: Alpha Vantage API
manifests.description_for_ai: Free stock market data API. Real-time and historical prices for stocks, ETFs, forex, crypto, and economic indicators. 25 API calls/day free. Use for portfolio tracking, price lookup, financial analysis.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get current stock price and daily stats for any ticker symbol. Use for stock price lookup, portfolio valuation.
Get daily OHLCV (open/high/low/close/volume) price history for a stock. Use for charts, trend analysis.

manifests.name: Amadeus for Developers
manifests.description_for_ai: Leading travel API platform. Search flights, hotels, and points of interest. Used by major travel agencies and booking sites. Free test environment. Use for 'find cheap flights', 'flight prices', 'hotels in city', 'things to do in destination'.
manifests.cost: Test: free with rate limits. Production: pay-per-call

agent_hints.iata_flow: Always call airport_search first if user mentions city name. E.g. 'Moscow' → SVO/DME/VKO. Then use IATA code in flight_offers_search.
agent_hints.common_airports: Moscow: SVO/DME, St.Petersburg: LED, London: LHR/LGW, Paris: CDG, Dubai: DXB, Istanbul: IST, Bangkok: BKK, NYC: JFK/EWR
agent_hints.test_vs_prod: Test environment uses test.api.amadeus.com. Production uses api.amadeus.com. Prices in test are real but booking is not possible.
agent_hints.date_format: Always use YYYY-MM-DD format for dates. Never use natural language dates directly.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search available flights between two cities with prices. Returns list of flight offers sorted by price. Use for 'find flights from Moscow to Dubai', 'cheapest flights to Paris', 'round trip to London'.
Find airport IATA codes by city name. Use before flight_offers_search when user mentions a city name instead of airport code.
Find things to do, attractions, and restaurants near coordinates. Use for 'what to do in Rome', 'tourist attractions near me', 'restaurants in Paris'.

manifests.name: Amazon Selling Partner API (SP-API)
manifests.description_for_ai: Amazon marketplace seller API. Manage listings, inventory, orders, pricing, FBA shipments, advertising. Access Amazon marketplace data for your seller account. 300M+ customers globally.
manifests.cost: Free API. Amazon seller account required.

agent_hints.auth: Requires LWA (Login with Amazon) OAuth. Get refresh token via Seller Central. Exchange for access token every hour.
agent_hints.marketplaces: US=ATVPDKIKX0DER, CA=A2EUQ1WTGCTBG2, UK=A1F83G8C2ARO7P, DE=A1PA6795UKMFR9, FR=A13V1IB3VIYZZH, JP=A1VC38T7YXB528
agent_hints.throttling: SP-API uses token bucket throttling. Rate varies by endpoint. Implement exponential backoff on 429s.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get orders from Amazon seller account. Returns order status, items, shipping info.
Get product details from Amazon catalog by ASIN.

manifests.name: amoCRM API (Россия/СНГ)
manifests.description_for_ai: Самая популярная CRM-система в России и СНГ. Сделки, контакты, компании, воронка продаж. Интеграция с мессенджерами и телефонией. Используй для управления продажами, лидами, клиентской базой в России.

agent_hints.subdomain: Replace {subdomain} with your amoCRM subdomain e.g. mycompany.amocrm.ru
agent_hints.oauth: Use OAuth2 long-lived token from account settings. Refresh tokens expire in 3 months.
agent_hints.leads_vs_contacts: amoCRM uses Leads (сделки) for sales pipeline and Contacts for people. Link them via associations.
agent_hints.webhooks: Configure webhooks in account for real-time updates on lead/contact changes.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get CRM leads (сделки) from amoCRM pipeline. Filter by status, pipeline, responsible manager, and date ranges.
Create a new CRM deal (сделка) in amoCRM with name, budget, pipeline stage, responsible manager, and custom fields.

manifests.name: Anthropic Claude API
manifests.description_for_ai: Anthropic Claude — family of frontier AI assistants. Claude Sonnet 4.5 for best coding and reasoning, Claude Haiku 4.5 for fast cheap tasks. Supports text, vision (images/PDFs), tool use, extended thinking. 200K token context. Best for: complex analysis, coding, long document processing, multilingual tasks including Russian.
manifests.cost: Claude Haiku 4.5: $0.80/$4 per 1M tokens. Claude Sonnet 4.5: $3/$15 per 1M tokens. Claude Opus 4: $15/$75 per 1M tokens

agent_hints.model_selection: claude-haiku-4-5: classification, routing, extraction, Q&A (fast, $0.80/1M). claude-sonnet-4-5: coding, analysis, long docs ($3/1M). claude-opus-4: hardest tasks only ($15/1M).
agent_hints.context_window: 200K tokens input — pass entire codebases, long documents, or many examples without chunking.
agent_hints.tool_use: Define tools with name, description, input_schema. Claude will call them automatically when needed and return results.
agent_hints.thinking: Extended thinking: add thinking={type:enabled, budget_tokens:8000} for math, logic, complex coding. Increases quality but also latency and cost.
agent_hints.pdf_support: Pass PDFs as {type: 'document', source: {type: 'base64', media_type: 'application/pdf', data: BASE64}} — Claude reads entire PDFs natively.
agent_hints.multimodal: Supports JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP images and PDF documents inline in messages.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Send messages to Claude for text generation, analysis, coding, translation. Supports multi-turn conversations, system prompts, tool use, and vision. Most capable model available for complex reasoning tasks.
Analyze images and PDFs with Claude. Describe content, extract text from images, answer questions about visual material. Pass images as base64 or URL.

manifests.name: Claude Haiku 4.5 (Fast/Cheap)
manifests.description_for_ai: Anthropic fastest and cheapest Claude model. Best for high-volume classification, extraction, summarization, simple Q&A. Near-instant responses. Use when speed and cost matter more than maximum capability.

agent_hints.vs_sonnet: Use Haiku for: classification, routing, short extraction, simple Q&A. Use Sonnet for: complex reasoning, long documents, coding.
agent_hints.speed: Haiku responds in ~0.5s vs ~2s for Sonnet. Great for real-time applications.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Anthropic fastest and cheapest Claude model. Best for high-volume classification, extraction, summarization, simple Q&A. Near-instant responses. Use when speed and cost matter more than maximum capability. Fast text classification, routing, extraction at low cost. Use for labeling, intent detection, sentiment at scale.

manifests.name: Anthropic API — Free Tier Access
manifests.description_for_ai: Anthropic provides free tier access to Claude models via API. Claude Haiku 4.5 has the most generous free usage. No credit card required to start. Best free frontier AI API alongside Gemini.
manifests.cost: Free tier available. Claude Haiku 4.5: $0.80/$4 per 1M tokens when paid

capabilities.description_for_ai: Send messages to Claude AI. Free tier available without credit card. Best for: analysis, writing, coding, Q&A in Russian, English, and 100+ languages.

manifests.name: Apollo.io API
manifests.description_for_ai: Apollo.io — B2B sales intelligence platform with 265M+ contacts and 70M+ companies. Verified emails, direct dials, LinkedIn URLs, technographic data, buying intent signals. Used by 10,000+ sales teams. Sequences, email tracking, and CRM sync included. Best for outbound sales at scale.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search 265M+ B2B contacts with advanced filters: job title, seniority, company size, industry, location. Returns verified emails and phone numbers.
Enrich a person profile from Apollo database: get verified email, direct phone, LinkedIn URL, job title, and company from name and company/domain.

manifests.name: arXiv API
manifests.description_for_ai: Free access to 2M+ preprint research papers in physics, mathematics, computer science, AI, biology, economics. No API key needed. Real-time preprints before peer review. Best source for latest AI research.

agent_hints.categories: cs.AI=AI, cs.LG=Machine Learning, cs.CL=NLP, cs.CV=Computer Vision, cs.RO=Robotics, quant-ph=Quantum Physics, math=Mathematics
agent_hints.response_format: Returns Atom XML. Parse entry elements for papers.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Free access to 2M+ preprint research papers in physics, mathematics, computer science, AI, biology, economics. No API key needed. Real-time preprints before peer review. Best source for latest AI research. Search arXiv preprints by keyword, author, title, abstract. Best for latest AI/ML/CS research papers.

manifests.name: AssemblyAI API
manifests.description_for_ai: AI-powered speech-to-text and audio intelligence. Transcribe audio files or streams. Speaker diarization, sentiment analysis, topic detection, PII redaction, content moderation, auto chapters. Best for processing audio content at scale.

agent_hints.async_flow: 1) POST to /transcript with audio_url → get id. 2) Poll GET /transcript/{id} until status=completed. Usually 30-60s for 1h audio.
agent_hints.streaming: For real-time use WebSocket endpoint wss://api.assemblyai.com/v2/realtime/ws

capabilities.description_for_ai: Transcribe audio file to text with timestamps, speaker labels, and AI insights. Submit URL or upload file. Async — returns job ID then poll for result.
Poll for transcription result after submitting job. Check status field: queued→processing→completed/error.

manifests.name: ATTOM Property Data API
manifests.description_for_ai: ATTOM Property Data API — comprehensive US property intelligence. 155M+ properties with assessment values, ownership history, sales transactions, mortgage data, foreclosures, school ratings, natural hazard scores, and neighborhood demographics. Used by real estate, mortgage, and insurance companies.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get full property details: assessed value, tax info, lot size, year built, bedrooms, bathrooms, last sale price and date.

manifests.name: Auth0 Management API
manifests.description_for_ai: Identity platform for authentication and authorization. User management, social login, MFA, SSO, machine-to-machine auth. 7500 MAU free. Industry standard for auth in web/mobile apps.

agent_hints.tenant: Replace {tenant} with your Auth0 tenant domain e.g. myapp.auth0.com or myapp.eu.auth0.com
agent_hints.m2m_token: Get Management API token: Machine-to-Machine app → authorize with https://{tenant}/api/v2/ audience.
agent_hints.token_expiry: Management API tokens expire in 24 hours. Cache and refresh automatically.
agent_hints.connections: Username-Password-Authentication is default DB connection. Social logins have their own connection names.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get users from Auth0 tenant with profile, login stats, and custom metadata. Filter by email, connection, or custom query.
Create a new user in Auth0 database connection. Set email, password, and custom metadata.

manifests.name: AviationStack API
manifests.description_for_ai: Real-time flight data, airport info, airline data. 250+ airlines, 8000+ airports. Free tier: 100 API calls/month. Track flights, get airport details, airline info.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Real-time flight data, airport info, airline data. 250+ airlines, 8000+ airports. Free tier: 100 API calls/month. Track flights, get airport details, airline info. Get real-time flight data. Filter by flight number, airline, departure/arrival airport.

manifests.name: Авито API (Россия)
manifests.description_for_ai: Крупнейший классифайд России. API для бизнеса: управление объявлениями (недвижимость, авто, товары, услуги, работа), чаты с покупателями, статистика, авторизация через Авито. 60M+ уникальных пользователей в месяц.

agent_hints.auth: OAuth2 client credentials: POST /token with client_id and client_secret from developer.avito.ru
agent_hints.scope: Request scopes: items:info (view ads), job:read (employment), user:read (profile)
agent_hints.rate_limits: API rate limits vary by plan. Free tier: 100 req/min. Check X-RateLimit headers.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get your own active/inactive listings on Авито with status, price, views, and category.
Search public listings on Авито by keyword, category, and location. Returns ads with price, photos, and seller info.

manifests.name: Авито.Работа
manifests.description_for_ai: Авито.Работа API — раздел трудоустройства крупнейшего российского классифайда. 7M+ вакансий и резюме. Публикация вакансий, поиск кандидатов, управление откликами. 60M+ уникальных пользователей в месяц. Популярен для рабочих профессий и регионального найма.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Получить список вакансий работодателя. Только для работодателей — управление своими вакансиями. Не для поиска вакансий соискателями.
Get job applications and candidate responses from Авито.Работа. Filter by vacancy and status. Returns candidate profile, contact details, and CV link.

manifests.name: Amazon Comprehend
manifests.description_for_ai: AWS NLP service. Sentiment analysis, entity recognition, key phrase extraction, language detection, topic modeling, document classification. 50K units/month free first year. Supports 12 languages.
manifests.cost: Free: 50K units/month (1 year). Then $0.0001 per unit

capabilities.description_for_ai: Detect sentiment in text: POSITIVE, NEGATIVE, NEUTRAL, MIXED with confidence scores. Supports 12 languages.
Extract named entities from text: PERSON, ORGANIZATION, LOCATION, DATE, QUANTITY, COMMERCIAL_ITEM, EVENT.

manifests.name: AWS IoT Core API
manifests.description_for_ai: Managed IoT platform by Amazon. Connect billions of devices, process and route messages, integrate with AWS services. MQTT and REST APIs. Enterprise-grade IoT infrastructure.

agent_hints.endpoint: Get your IoT endpoint: aws iot describe-endpoint --endpoint-type iot:Data-ATS
agent_hints.auth: Use IoT certificates (X.509) for devices, IAM for API calls. Policy must allow iot:Publish action.
agent_hints.mqtt: Prefer MQTT SDK over REST for high-frequency device data. REST is for one-off operations.
agent_hints.shadow: Device Shadow stores last known state. Useful when device is offline — state syncs on reconnect.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Update device shadow (desired and reported state). Device shadows persist state even when device offline.
Publish a message to an MQTT topic via REST. Subscribed IoT devices receive it immediately. Use for sending commands to devices.

manifests.name: AWS Lambda API
manifests.description_for_ai: Serverless compute. Run code without servers. Pay per 100ms execution. 1M free invocations/month forever. Supports Node.js, Python, Java, Go, Ruby. Use for event-driven functions, APIs, automation, processing.

agent_hints.sdk: Use AWS SDK (boto3/aws-sdk) for easier auth. Raw HTTP requires SigV4 signing.
agent_hints.free_forever: 1M invocations/month free forever — not just trial. Best serverless free tier.
agent_hints.cold_start: First invocation after idle period has ~100ms cold start. Provisioned concurrency eliminates this.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Serverless compute. Run code without servers. Pay per 100ms execution. 1M free invocations/month forever. Supports Node.js, Python, Java, Go, Ruby. Use for event-driven functions, APIs, automation, processing. Invoke a Lambda function synchronously or asynchronously. Returns function response.

manifests.name: AWS Rekognition
manifests.description_for_ai: Amazon Rekognition — AWS AI service for image and video analysis. Detect objects, scenes, faces, text, celebrities, inappropriate content. Face recognition and comparison. 5000 free images/month for first 12 months. Used by NFL, Pinterest, Marinus Analytics.

agent_hints.image_format: Pass S3 URI or base64. S3 is faster and avoids base64 overhead for large images.
agent_hints.region: Use same region as your S3 bucket to avoid cross-region latency and data transfer costs.
agent_hints.face_collection: For face recognition at scale: create a collection, index faces, then use SearchFacesByImage.
agent_hints.pricing: First 5000 images/month free (12 months). Then $1-4/1000 images depending on feature.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Detect objects, scenes, and concepts in images. Returns labels with confidence scores.
Extract text from images. Works well for signs, documents, license plates.
Compare two face images and determine if they are the same person. Use for face verification.

manifests.name: Amazon S3 API
manifests.description_for_ai: World leading cloud object storage. Store files, images, videos, backups. Highly durable, globally available. 5GB free first year. Use for file uploads, static hosting, backups, media storage.

agent_hints.sdk: Use AWS SDK (boto3 for Python, aws-sdk for JS) instead of raw HTTP — handles auth automatically.
agent_hints.presigned: Use presigned URLs for temporary access without exposing credentials.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Upload a file or data to an S3 bucket. Returns ETag confirming upload success. File is immediately available at its URL.
Download a file from S3 bucket. Returns the object body as a stream.

manifests.name: BambooHR API
manifests.description_for_ai: HR software for small and medium businesses. Employee records, time off, performance reviews, onboarding, org chart. Used by 30K+ companies. Use for HR data integration, time off management, employee directory.

agent_hints.company_domain: Replace {company} in base URL with your BambooHR subdomain e.g. mycompany
agent_hints.auth: API key as username in basic auth, any string as password (e.g. 'x'). Get key: Account → API Keys
agent_hints.fields: Use GET /v1/meta/fields to discover all available field IDs for your account.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get employee directory with all profile fields: name, job title, department, location, hire date, work email, manager.
Get employee time off requests (PTO, vacation, sick days) with dates, status, type, and hours/days amount.

manifests.name: Binance API
manifests.description_for_ai: World largest crypto exchange by volume. Real-time prices, order books, trading history for 2000+ crypto pairs. Free market data, no key needed for public endpoints. Use for crypto prices, market data, trading automation.
manifests.cost: Free for market data. Trading: 0.1% per trade

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get current price of any crypto pair. No API key needed. Fastest and most accurate crypto price data.
Get OHLCV candlestick data for any crypto pair and interval. Use for price charts, technical analysis.

manifests.name: Bitrix24 REST API
manifests.description_for_ai: Популярная платформа для бизнеса в России и СНГ. CRM, задачи, проекты, коммуникации, HR, документооборот. Бесплатный план до 5 пользователей. Используй для управления компанией, CRM, задачами.
manifests.cost: Бесплатно до 5 пользователей. Базовый от 2490 руб/мес

agent_hints.auth: Use webhook or OAuth. Webhook: Settings → Developer resources → Inbound webhooks. Scope: task, crm.
agent_hints.portal: Replace {portal} with your Bitrix24 subdomain e.g. mycompany.bitrix24.ru
agent_hints.pagination: All list methods return 50 items max. Use start=50, 100, 150... to paginate.
agent_hints.ru_market: Most popular all-in-one business platform in Russia and CIS. Includes CRM, tasks, HR, documents, chat.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get CRM leads from Bitrix24. Filter by status, responsible user, date. Returns ID, title, name, phone, email, status.
Create a new task in Bitrix24. Assign to user, set deadline, add description and checklist items.

manifests.name: Booking.com Demand API
manifests.description_for_ai: Booking.com Demand API — access 28M+ accommodation listings worldwide. Hotels, apartments, hostels, villas with real-time prices and availability. 43+ languages, 150K+ destinations. Requires Booking.com partner agreement. Used by travel agencies and OTA platforms.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Hotel and accommodation search. 28M+ listings worldwide. Prices, availability, reviews, photos. Partner API requires approval. Use for travel apps, hotel booking, accommodation search. Search hotels by location and dates. Returns availability, prices, ratings, facilities.

manifests.name: Brevo (Sendinblue) API
manifests.description_for_ai: All-in-one marketing platform. Email, SMS, WhatsApp, push notifications, CRM. 500K+ companies. Generous free tier: 300 emails/day. Use for transactional email, marketing campaigns, SMS, WhatsApp Business.

agent_hints.api_key: Get API key: account.brevo.com → SMTP & API → API Keys → Create a new API key
agent_hints.sender_name: SMS sender name: max 11 alphanumeric chars (no spaces). Register with carriers for best deliverability.
agent_hints.free_plan: Free plan: 300 emails/day unlimited contacts. SMS is pay-per-message (~0.5-2 cents depending on country).
agent_hints.templates: Create email templates in Brevo UI, then reference by templateId in send_email for personalized campaigns.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Send transactional or marketing email via Brevo. Supports templates, HTML content, attachments.
Send transactional SMS message via Brevo to any phone number worldwide. Supports 180+ countries.

manifests.name: Carbon Interface API
manifests.description_for_ai: Calculate carbon emissions for flights, driving, shipping, electricity. Returns CO2 equivalent in grams/kg. Use for carbon footprint calculators, sustainability apps, ESG reporting.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Calculate CO2 equivalent emissions for a flight between airports. Returns carbon per passenger in kg and metric tons.
Calculate CO2 emissions for driving a specific vehicle model over a given distance.

manifests.name: Центральный Банк РФ API (ЦБ России)

agent_hints.geo_tip: Большинство наборов содержат поля Latitude и Longitude внутри Cells. Фильтруй по административному округу через Cells/AdmArea или по координатам.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Получить данные из конкретного набора данных по его ID. Это основной метод — все данные портала хранятся в наборах с числовыми ID. Примеры: 526=аптеки, 1095=поликлиники, 2453=парковки, 619=остановки транспорта, 1938=спортплощадки, 582=библиотеки.
Поиск наборов данных по ключевому слову. Используй когда не знаешь ID нужного набора — найди его по теме.

manifests.cost: DeepSeek V4 Flash: $0.14/$0.28 per 1M tokens. DeepSeek R1: $0.55/$2.19. Cache hits: $0.014/$0.028

agent_hints.price_tip: DeepSeek V4 Flash at $0.14/$0.28 is 10-50x cheaper than GPT-4o for similar quality tasks.
agent_hints.reasoner: deepseek-reasoner (R1) shows chain-of-thought in reasoning_content field before final answer. Best for math, code, logic.
agent_hints.openai_compat: Drop-in OpenAI replacement: change base URL + model name. No other code changes needed.
agent_hints.cache_discount: Cache hit pricing is 100x cheaper — structure prompts to maximize cache reuse.
agent_hints.data_privacy: Servers in China. Do not send sensitive personal data or confidential business information.
agent_hints.stability: DeepSeek has had reliability issues during peak demand. Add retry logic and consider fallback to OpenAI/Gemini.

Use for Etsy seller automation, shop management, marketplace integration. Search Etsy listings by keyword and filters. Returns handmade, vintage, and craft items.

manifests.name: ExchangeRate-API

agent_hints.common_codes: USD=US Dollar, EUR=Euro, RUB=Russian Ruble, GBP=British Pound, JPY=Japanese Yen, CNY=Chinese Yuan, KZT=Kazakhstani Tenge, BYN=Belarusian Ruble, UAH=Ukrainian Hryvnia
agent_hints.update_frequency: Rates updated every 24 hours on free tier, every hour on Pro.
agent_hints.calculation_tip: To convert: result = amount * conversion_rate. E.g. 100 USD * 89.5 = 8950 RUB

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get current exchange rates for a base currency against all other currencies. Use for 'what is USD to RUB rate', 'convert euros to dollars', 'currency exchange rates today'.
Convert a specific amount from one currency to another. Use for 'how much is 100 dollars in rubles', 'convert 500 EUR to GBP'.
intent: how much is X in Y

manifests.name: Meta Ads API (Facebook/Instagram Ads)

capabilities.description_for_ai: Advertise on Facebook and Instagram. Create campaigns, ad sets, ads. Access detailed analytics. 3B+ users reach. Powerful audience targeting: interests, demographics, lookalikes, custom audiences. Get Facebook/Instagram ad performance: reach, impressions, clicks, spend, conversions, ROAS by campaign, ad set, or ad.

agent_hints.access_token: Page posts require a Page Access Token (not User token). Get via: GET /{user_id}/accounts to list pages and their tokens.
agent_hints.permissions: For reading: pages_read_engagement. For publishing: pages_manage_posts. Request via App Review for production.
agent_hints.rate_limits: Facebook uses app-level and user-level rate limits. Watch X-App-Usage and X-Ad-Account-Usage headers.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get posts from a Facebook Page with engagement metrics (likes, comments, shares). Requires Page access token and pages_read_engagement permission.
Publish a text or link post to a Facebook Page. Requires Page publish_actions permission and Page access token.

manifests.name: ФИАС / ГАР (Федеральная информационная адресная система)

Используй для валидации и стандартизации российских адресов, получения почтовых индексов, поиска ФИАС-кода адреса.

agent_hints.use_case: ФИАС полезен для валидации адресов при оформлении доставки, регистрации юрлиц, заполнения форм. Для поиска организаций по адресу используй 2GIS или Яндекс.Карты.
agent_hints.update_note: База обновляется еженедельно. Новостройки могут появляться с задержкой.
agent_hints.full_db: Полная база ФИАС доступна для скачивания на fias.nalog.ru (~20 ГБ XML). Для большинства задач достаточно API.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Поиск адреса в государственном реестре по строке. Возвращает стандартизированный адрес с ФИАС-кодом, почтовым индексом и иерархией (регион → город → улица → дом). Используй для проверки и нормализации адресов.
Получить дочерние объекты адреса (например, все улицы города или все дома на улице). Используй для построения иерархического выбора адреса.

manifests.name: Firebase API (Google)

capabilities.description_for_ai: Query Firestore NoSQL database documents. Filter by fields, order results, paginate.
Send push notification to mobile device via Firebase Cloud Messaging. Use for mobile app notifications.

manifests.name: Fitbit API

agent_hints.date_format: Dates: YYYY-MM-DD. Special value: today for current day. For ranges use /date/{startDate}/{endDate}
agent_hints.units: Distance in km (metric) or miles (imperial). Set via Accept-Language header or user profile.
agent_hints.intraday: Intraday data (per-minute heart rate etc.) requires special API access approval from Fitbit.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get daily activity data: steps, distance, calories, floors, active minutes for a user.
Get Fitbit sleep data: total duration, sleep efficiency score, and breakdown by stage (deep, light, REM, awake) with timestamps.
Get heart rate data including resting heart rate and zones.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get real-time status of a specific flight by flight number. Returns departure/arrival times, gate, delay status, aircraft type.
Search for flights departing from or arriving at an airport. Returns scheduled and live flight data with status.

manifests.name: Football-Data.org API

agent_hints.free_competitions: Free tier: PL, BL1, FL1, PD, SA, CL, WC. Other competitions need paid tier.
agent_hints.live_scores: LIVE and IN_PLAY status filters give current live matches.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get football match results and upcoming fixtures. Filter by competition, team, date range.
Get current league standings table with points, goals, wins, losses.

Use for finding nearby places, business info, check-ins. Search for places near coordinates by category or keyword. Returns name, address, hours, distance, rating.

manifests.name: Freshdesk API

agent_hints.auth: API key as username in HTTP Basic auth, any string as password. Get key: Profile Settings → Your API Key
agent_hints.domain: Replace {domain} with your Freshdesk subdomain e.g. mycompany.freshdesk.com
agent_hints.free_plan: Free plan: up to 10 agents. All standard API endpoints available on free plan.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create a new customer support ticket in Freshdesk with priority, type, tags, and optional custom fields.

Search species by name. Returns taxonomic info: kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search species by scientific or common name. Returns taxonomy, status, common names in multiple languages.
Get full species details including common names in all languages and media.

manifests.name: GitHub API

manifests.cost: Free for public repos. GitHub Pro: $4/month

agent_hints.search_tip: Use qualifiers in search: 'language:python stars:>500 topic:llm' finds popular Python LLM repos.
agent_hints.base64_tip: File content for create_file must be Base64 encoded. In JS: btoa(content). In Python: base64.b64encode(content.encode()).decode()
agent_hints.rate_limit: Without auth: 60 req/hour. With token: 5000 req/hour. Always use token in production.
agent_hints.pagination: Results paginated. Use ?page=2&per_page=100 to get more results.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search GitHub repositories by keyword, language, stars, topics, and more. Returns repo details, stats, and clone URLs.
Get detailed information about a GitHub repository: description, stars, forks, language, topics, license, open issues.
Create a new file in a GitHub repository with content. Commits the file and returns the commit SHA.
Get public profile of a GitHub user: bio, repos count, followers, location.

agent_hints.auth: Personal access token or OAuth2. Create at gitlab.com/-/user_settings/personal_access_tokens. Scopes: api, read_api.
agent_hints.self_hosted: Base URL changes for self-hosted: https://gitlab.yourcompany.com/api/v4. Same API.
agent_hints.project_id: Get project ID from: project page → Settings → General (shown at top). Or URL-encode the path: group%2Fsubgroup%2Fproject.

capabilities.description_for_ai: List GitLab projects/repositories. Filter by membership, visibility, search.

Get complete details for a specific book by its Google Books Volume ID.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get upcoming or past calendar events with full details. Filter by date range, search query, or calendar. Supports recurring events.
Create a new calendar event with title, time, location, attendees, reminders, and recurrence rules.

manifests.name: Google Gemini API

Supports text, vision, audio, video, and code. 1M+ token context window. Use when cost matters or for multimodal tasks involving video/audio.
manifests.cost: Free tier: 1500 req/day for Gemini 2.5 Flash. Paid: $0.30/$2.50 per 1M tokens for 2.5 Flash

agent_hints.free_tier: gemini-2.5-flash: 1500 requests/day FREE. Best free frontier model in 2026.
agent_hints.multimodal: Pass images, audio, video inline. gemini-2.5-pro handles 1M token context with full video/audio understanding.
agent_hints.context: 1M token context = entire codebases, long books, hours of audio. No chunking needed.
agent_hints.thinking: gemini-2.5-flash-thinking-exp supports extended reasoning for hard problems.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Generate text, analyze images/video/audio, answer questions, write code. Gemini 2.0 Flash is default — fast, free 1500 req/day. Use gemini-2.5-pro for complex reasoning with 1M context window.
Create text embeddings using Gemini Embedding model. For semantic search and RAG.
Count tokens in content before sending to estimate cost and check context limits.

manifests.name: Gemini 2.5 Flash API
manifests.description_for_ai: Googles fastest and cheapest frontier model. Excellent quality at $0.30/$2.50 per 1M tokens. 1M token context. Free tier: 1500 req/day. Best for: high-volume tasks, real-time applications, cost-sensitive production.

agent_hints.free_tier: 1500 req/day free — most generous free tier among frontier models in 2026.
agent_hints.best_value: Best price-to-quality ratio in 2026. OpenAI-comparable quality at lower cost.
agent_hints.thinking: Add thinkingConfig: {thinkingBudget: 1024} for chain-of-thought on complex tasks.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Fast, cheap frontier AI. Best for high-volume classification, extraction, summarization, translation. 1500 req/day free.

manifests.name: Gemini 2.5 Pro API

agent_hints.context_window: 1M tokens = ~750K words = entire novel or codebase. Pass entire files without chunking.
agent_hints.vs_flash: gemini-2.5-flash for high volume cheap tasks. gemini-2.5-pro for best quality when it matters.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Generate with Google flagship model. Best for: 1M token context, code review of entire repos, complex reasoning, long document analysis.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search hotels on Google Hotels with prices and availability. Returns hotel listings from Google with prices from multiple booking sites.
Get detailed info for a specific hotel: all prices across booking sites, amenities, photos, reviews summary, and location.

manifests.name: Google Maps Platform
manifests.description_for_ai: World's most widely used mapping and location API. Covers geocoding, places search, directions, distance matrix, and static maps. Global coverage. Used by millions of apps. Best for international use cases outside Russia.
manifests.cost: Free: $200/month credit. Geocoding: $5/1000 requests. Places: $17/1000 requests

agent_hints.vs_yandex: For Russia use Yandex Maps (better Russian address data). Google Maps is better for international locations.
agent_hints.place_types: Common types: restaurant, cafe, pharmacy, hospital, bank, supermarket, gas_station, gym, hotel, school, airport, subway_station.

agent_hints.pricing_tip: Each API has separate pricing. Geocoding and Directions are cheapest. Places Nearby is more expensive — use sparingly.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Convert address to coordinates (forward) or coordinates to address (reverse). Best geocoder globally. Use for any address-to-coordinates task outside Russia (for Russia prefer Yandex Maps).
Find places (restaurants, shops, hospitals, etc.) near coordinates. Returns name, rating, opening hours, price level. Use for 'restaurants nearby', 'find a pharmacy', 'coffee shops around here'.
Get directions between two points. Returns route steps, duration, distance, and travel mode options. Use for 'how to get from A to B', 'driving directions', 'transit route'.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Analyze sentiment of text: overall positive/negative/neutral score and per-sentence breakdown.

capabilities.description_for_ai: SEO data from Google. Search queries, impressions, clicks, CTR, average position for your website in Google Search. Crawl errors, indexing status, sitemaps. agent_hints.vs_gemini: For complex image understanding use Gemini Vision. For specific tasks (OCR, logos, explicit detection) use Vision API.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Geocode an address to coordinates. Strong accuracy in Germany, Europe, and automotive use cases. Returns lat/lng, formatted address, and bounding box.
Calculate route with real-time traffic. Returns turn-by-turn instructions, duration, distance, and route polyline.

manifests.name: HFLabs API (Контактные данные)

capabilities.description_for_ai: Проверка email адреса: синтаксис, существование домена, SMTP проверка, признак корпоративного email.
Проверка и форматирование российского телефонного номера. Определяет оператора, регион.

manifests.name: HeadHunter Беларусь (hh.by / rabota.by)
manifests.description_for_ai: Крупнейшая биржа труда Беларуси. API идентично hh.ru — те же endpoints, те же параметры. Зарплаты в белорусских рублях (BYN). Используй для поиска вакансий в Беларуси.

agent_hints.base_url: API identical to hh.ru — change base_url to api.hh.by for Belarus-specific results
agent_hints.areas: Belarus area ID: 16. Minsk ID: 153. Get full list from /areas endpoint.
agent_hints.currency: Salaries in BYR (Belarusian rubles). 1 USD ≈ 3.2 BYR (2024).

capabilities.description_for_ai: Поиск вакансий в Беларуси по ключевому слову и городу. Зарплаты в BYN (белорусских рублях). Используй для запросов 'работа в Минске', 'вакансии в Беларуси', 'найди работу разработчика в Гомеле'.
Get full vacancy details: title, company, salary range, requirements, responsibilities, employer contacts. Returns structured data in Russian.
Get list of geographic areas/cities available for job search in Belarus with their IDs.

manifests.name: HeadHunter Казахстан (hh.kz)
manifests.description_for_ai: Крупнейшая биржа труда Казахстана. Используй для поиска вакансий в Казахстане по ключевым словам, городу или координатам. API идентично hh.ru, отличается только базовым URL и валютой (тенге). Зарплаты в тенге (₸).

agent_hints.base_url: Use api.hh.kz for Kazakhstan-localized results. API identical to hh.ru.
agent_hints.areas: Kazakhstan area ID: 40. Almaty: 160. Astana/Nur-Sultan: 159. Get full list from /areas.
agent_hints.currency: Salaries in KZT (Kazakhstani tenge). Filter by: salary_currency=KZT.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Поиск вакансий в Казахстане по ключевому слову, городу или координатам. Зарплаты в тенге (₸). Используй для запросов 'работа в Алматы', 'вакансии в Астане', 'найди работу в Казахстане'.
Get full vacancy details from hh.kz Kazakhstan: title, company, salary in KZT, requirements, and employer info.
Список городов Казахстана с ID для фильтрации вакансий.

manifests.name: HeadHunter (hh.ru)
manifests.description_for_ai: Крупнейшая российская биржа труда. Используй для поиска вакансий по ключевым словам, городу или координатам пользователя. Возвращает зарплату, работодателя, график работы, опыт. Не требует авторизации для поиска.

agent_hints.geo_flow: Если пользователь говорит 'рядом' — передай lat/lng. Если называет город — сначала get_areas чтобы найти area_id.
agent_hints.salary_tip: Пользователи часто говорят '50к' — конвертируй в рубли (50000).
agent_hints.pagination: По умолчанию 20 вакансий. Для большего используй per_page=100 и page.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Поиск вакансий по ключевому слову и геолокации. Основной метод для запросов типа 'найди работу Python-разработчика рядом со мной' или 'вакансии курьера в Казани с зарплатой от 50000'.
Полное описание вакансии по ID. Используй после search_vacancies когда пользователь хочет подробности: требования, описание, адрес офиса, контакты.
Get hierarchical list of geographic areas available for job search: countries, regions, cities with their IDs.
Get reference dictionaries: employment types, experience levels, salary currencies, schedule types, and other field options.
Информация о работодателе: описание, сайт, количество вакансий. Используй когда пользователь хочет узнать больше о компании.

manifests.name: hh.uz API (Узбекистан)
manifests.description_for_ai: HeadHunter Узбекистан. Крупнейший портал вакансий Узбекистана. API идентично hh.ru — те же endpoints, те же параметры. Зарплаты в узбекских сумах (UZS). Используй для поиска вакансий в Узбекистане.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Поиск вакансий в Узбекистане. Зарплаты в сумах (UZS). Используй для запросов о работе в Узбекистане, вакансиях в Ташкенте.

manifests.name: Home Assistant REST API
manifests.description_for_ai: Open-source home automation platform. Control 3000+ smart home devices: lights, switches, sensors, climate, media players, locks. Local API via REST. The most popular self-hosted smart home platform.

agent_hints.domains: Common domains: light, switch, climate, media_player, lock, cover, sensor, binary_sensor, input_boolean
agent_hints.local: Local network only. For remote access use Home Assistant Cloud (Nabu Casa) or VPN.
agent_hints.nabu_casa: With Nabu Casa subscription get remote URL: https://{id}.ui.nabu.casa/api

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get current state of all or specific entities: lights, sensors, switches, locks, climate.
Call Home Assistant service to control any device. Most powerful method — covers all automations.
Get historical state data for entities over a time period.

manifests.name: HTML/CSS to PDF API (pdfcrowd)
manifests.description_for_ai: Convert HTML content or any URL to PDF with high-fidelity rendering. Supports JavaScript, CSS, custom headers/footers. Used for invoice generation, reports, document export. Multiple providers available (pdfcrowd API shown).

capabilities.description_for_ai: Convert any URL to PDF. Renders JavaScript and CSS fully. Returns binary PDF. Use for generating PDF versions of web pages or web apps.
Convert HTML string directly to PDF. Best for template-based documents like invoices, contracts, receipts.

manifests.name: HubSpot CRM API
manifests.description_for_ai: Free CRM with 1.7M+ companies using it. Contacts, companies, deals, tickets, emails. Marketing automation, sales pipeline, customer support. Free tier very generous. Use for CRM integration, lead management, sales automation.

agent_hints.auth: Create Private App in HubSpot: Settings → Integrations → Private Apps → Create. Scopes needed: crm.objects.contacts.read/write, crm.objects.deals.read/write
agent_hints.free_crm: HubSpot CRM is genuinely free for unlimited contacts and deals. API included.
agent_hints.pagination: Use search API (POST) instead of list API (GET) for filtering. Paginate with paging.next.after cursor.
agent_hints.properties: Get all available properties via GET /crm/v3/properties/contacts — HubSpot has 100s of built-in + unlimited custom.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get CRM contacts with properties. Supports filtering, sorting, and pagination. Returns up to 100 contacts per page.
Create a new CRM contact with email, name, phone, and any custom properties.
Create a sales deal in HubSpot pipeline with amount, stage, and close date.

manifests.name: Hugging Face Inference API
manifests.description_for_ai: Run 300,000+ open-source ML models via API. Text generation, classification, translation, image generation, audio. Free tier available. Access to Llama, Mistral, SDXL, Whisper and thousands of specialized models.
manifests.cost: Free tier available. PRO: $9/month for priority

agent_hints.cold_start: Free tier models sleep — first request may take 20-30s. Use wait_for_model=true.
agent_hints.model_search: Search models at huggingface.co/models — filter by task (text-generation, image-classification etc.)

capabilities.description_for_ai: Generate text using any Hugging Face model. Use model ID like meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct or mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct.

manifests.name: Hunter.io API
manifests.description_for_ai: Hunter.io — email finder and verification API for B2B outreach. Find verified professional email addresses from domain names, full names, or LinkedIn profiles. Email validation with deliverability check. 25 free searches/month. Used by 3M+ sales and marketing professionals.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Find all publicly known email addresses at a company domain. Returns emails with name, job title, and LinkedIn when available.
Find email address for a specific person at a company given their name and domain.
Verify if an email address is valid and deliverable. Checks MX records, SMTP, disposable email.

manifests.name: Idealista API (Spain/Italy/Portugal)
manifests.description_for_ai: Idealista — крупнейший портал недвижимости в Испании, Италии и Португалии. 2M+ объявлений: аренда, покупка, коммерческая недвижимость. Официальный API для профессионалов рынка. Used by real estate agents and property portals across Southern Europe.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Leading property portal in Spain, Italy and Portugal. Buy and rent listings. Official API for real estate professionals. Use for property search in Southern Europe. Search properties in Spain, Italy or Portugal for sale or rent.
Get full property details by Idealista property code: photos, floor plan, description, price history, energy certificate, and contact info.

manifests.name: imgix API
manifests.description_for_ai: Real-time image processing and CDN. Transform, optimize, and deliver images via URL parameters. Resize, crop, filters, format conversion. Enterprise image infrastructure used by SquareSpace, BuzzFeed, 500px. Pay per GB bandwidth.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Transform images via URL parameters. Resize, crop, adjust brightness/contrast/saturation, apply blur, add watermark, convert format.

manifests.name: iNaturalist API
manifests.description_for_ai: Citizen science nature platform. 200M+ wildlife observations from around the world. Species identification, location data, photos. Community-verified identifications. Use for nature apps, biodiversity research, species sightings.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search wildlife observations from 200M+ citizen science records. Filter by species, location, date, and quality grade.
Get species suggestions for an image. Uses AI to identify species from photo.

manifests.name: Infermedica API
manifests.description_for_ai: AI-powered symptom checker and medical triage API. Identify possible conditions from symptoms. Used by 100+ healthcare companies. Use for preliminary symptom assessment, triage, health apps. Always recommend consulting a doctor.
manifests.cost: Free sandbox. Production pricing on request

agent_hints.disclaimer: ALWAYS display: 'This is not medical advice. Consult a healthcare professional for diagnosis and treatment.'
agent_hints.flow: 1) parse_symptoms(text) → get symptom IDs. 2) diagnose(sex, age, evidence) → get conditions. 3) Show results with medical disclaimer.
agent_hints.interview_mode: Use should_stop=false + question field to implement conversational symptom interview for more accurate diagnosis.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Extract symptom IDs from natural language text. First step before diagnosis — converts 'I have a headache and fever' into structured symptom evidence.
Get possible diagnoses with probability scores based on symptoms. ALWAYS show medical disclaimer. Do not replace professional medical advice.

manifests.name: Instagram Graph API
manifests.description_for_ai: Instagram business and creator API. Get posts, stories, insights, comments. Publish content, reply to DMs, manage business accounts. 2B+ users. Requires Instagram Business/Creator account.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get Instagram posts, images, videos, reels for authenticated account.
Get Instagram account analytics: impressions, reach, profile views, follower count.

manifests.name: Intercom API
manifests.description_for_ai: Customer messaging platform. Live chat, chatbots, email campaigns, help center. 25K+ companies use it. Manage contacts, conversations, send messages. Use for customer engagement, support automation, in-app messaging.

agent_hints.auth: Create Access Token at app.intercom.com/a/apps/{app_id}/developer-hub/access-tokens. Add to Authorization: Bearer header.
agent_hints.contact_vs_user: role='user' for logged-in users, role='lead' for anonymous visitors. Users have external_id.
agent_hints.events: Track events via POST /events: {event_name: 'purchase', user_id: '123', created_at: unix_ts, metadata: {}}
agent_hints.rate_limits: 1000 req/min. Webhook events fire in real-time — prefer webhooks over polling.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create or update a contact in Intercom CRM. Set custom attributes for personalization.
Send an in-app message or email to a specific Intercom contact from an admin/bot.

manifests.name: ip-api.com

agent_hints.https: Free tier uses HTTP only. HTTPS requires Pro key.
agent_hints.commercial: Non-commercial use only on free tier. Get Pro key for commercial apps.
agent_hints.batch: Pro supports batch lookups of up to 100 IPs per request.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Free IP geolocation API. City, country, ISP, timezone, coordinates from IP address. No API key for non-commercial. 45 req/min free. Fastest free IP geolocation available. Get location from IP address. Returns country, city, ISP, timezone, coordinates. Free, no key needed.

manifests.name: IPGeolocation API
manifests.description_for_ai: Get location, timezone, currency, and ISP info from any IP address. Use to detect user country/city without GPS, localize content, detect VPN/proxy.

agent_hints.auto_detect: Call without ip param to get current user location — great for personalizing content.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get location, timezone, currency, and ISP info from any IP address. Use to detect user country/city without GPS, localize content, detect VPN/proxy. Get geographic location, timezone, currency and ISP for any IP address. Omit ip param to get info for caller IP.

manifests.name: Jira API (Atlassian)
manifests.description_for_ai: Issue and project tracking. Create, update, search issues. Sprints, boards, epics, comments, attachments. Used by 65K+ companies. Use for software project management, bug tracking, agile workflows.

agent_hints.auth: Use API token (not password): id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens. Format: email:token in base64.
agent_hints.jql_examples: Useful JQL: 'project=MYPROJ AND status!=Done ORDER BY created DESC', 'assignee=currentUser() AND sprint in openSprints()'
agent_hints.pagination: Use maxResults and startAt for pagination. Total in response.total field.
agent_hints.custom_fields: Custom fields have IDs like customfield_10001. Get full list via GET /rest/api/3/field

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search Jira issues using JQL (Jira Query Language). Find bugs, tasks, stories by project, status, assignee.
Create a new Jira issue: bug, task, story, epic.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Free jokes API. Programming, puns, dark humor, misc jokes. Supports 7 languages including Russian. Content filters for safe mode. No API key needed. Get a random joke by category. Use for fun, ice breakers, entertainment features.

manifests.name: Khan Academy API
manifests.description_for_ai: Free educational content API. Math, science, computing, humanities for all ages. Videos, exercises, articles. No API key needed for public content. Use for educational apps, homework help, skill assessment.

agent_hints.unofficial_note: Khan Academy's public API is limited. For curriculum data consider their official partner program.
agent_hints.topic_slugs: Common slugs: math, algebra, geometry, calculus, statistics, biology, chemistry, physics, computing, history
agent_hints.content_types: Content types: Exercise (interactive problems), Video (YouTube), Article (text)

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get Khan Academy topic content: videos, exercises, articles for a subject slug.
Search Khan Academy for educational content by keyword.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get email performance metrics: opens, clicks, revenue per email, unsubscribes for campaigns.
Create or update a customer profile in Klaviyo with email, custom properties for segmentation.
Track a customer event in Klaviyo to trigger automations. E.g. Placed Order, Viewed Product, Added to Cart.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Получить реквизиты организации по ИНН: название, ОГРН, адрес, руководитель, дата регистрации, уставный капитал.
Получить финансовую отчётность организации: выручка, прибыль, активы из бухгалтерской отчётности ФНС.

manifests.name: LanguageTool API
manifests.description_for_ai: Free grammar and spell checker. Supports 25+ languages including Russian, German, French, Spanish. Detects grammar errors, punctuation mistakes, style issues. Free: 20 req/min 20KB text.

agent_hints.language_codes: English: en-US or en-GB. Russian: ru-RU. German: de-DE. French: fr. Spanish: es.
agent_hints.free: Free tier is very generous — 20 req/min with 20KB text per request is enough for most use cases.
agent_hints.self_host: LanguageTool is open source and can be self-hosted for unlimited use.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Free grammar and spell checker. Supports 25+ languages including Russian, German, French, Spanish. Detects grammar errors, punctuation mistakes, style issues. Free: 20 req/min 20KB text. Check text for grammar, spelling, punctuation and style errors. Returns list of mistakes with suggestions.

manifests.name: Linear API
manifests.description_for_ai: Modern issue tracker loved by engineering teams. Issues, projects, cycles (sprints), roadmaps, automations. GraphQL API. Used by Vercel, Retool, Loom. Fast and developer-friendly.

agent_hints.graphql: Linear uses GraphQL only. All queries and mutations go to same endpoint.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get issues from Linear workspace with filters. Returns title, status, assignee, priority, team.
Create new Linear issue.

manifests.name: LinkedIn API
manifests.description_for_ai: Professional network API. 1B+ professionals. Access user profiles, company pages, job postings, share content. Use for professional profile lookup, job search integration, company info, B2B use cases.
manifests.cost: Free basic access. Some endpoints require LinkedIn partnership.

agent_hints.restricted: LinkedIn API is significantly more restricted than other social APIs. Many endpoints require LinkedIn partnership approval.
agent_hints.oauth_scope: Common scopes: openid profile email (for login), w_member_social (for posting), r_liteprofile (for profile reading).
agent_hints.urn_format: LinkedIn uses URN identifiers: urn:li:person:abc123 for users, urn:li:organization:123456 for companies.
agent_hints.best_use: LinkedIn API is best for: OAuth social login, sharing company updates, basic profile info. Job search API requires partnership.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get LinkedIn profile of the authenticated user: name, headline, location, summary, experience. Requires user to log in with LinkedIn.
Share a post on LinkedIn on behalf of authenticated user or company page.

manifests.name: LottieFiles API

manifests.cost: Free access to public animations. Pro for private.

agent_hints.usage: Download lottieUrl JSON and use with lottie-web library: lottie.loadAnimation({container, renderer: svg, loop: true, autoplay: true, path: lottieUrl})
agent_hints.free_alternatives: Many common animations (loading, success, error) available free at lottiefiles.com/search

capabilities.description_for_ai: Animation platform. Access 200K+ free Lottie animations (JSON-based vector animations). Search animations by keyword. Used to add beautiful animations to apps and websites. Animations are lightweight, scalable, and work everywhere. Search LottieFiles for animations by keyword. Returns JSON animation files ready to embed.

manifests.name: Luma AI Dream Machine API
manifests.description_for_ai: AI video generation from text or image. Dream Machine model creates cinematic quality videos. 5 second clips. Use for creative video content, marketing, social media videos.

agent_hints.async_flow: Video generation is async: 1) POST to create generation → get id. 2) Poll GET /generations/{id} every 3-5s until state=completed. 3) Download assets.video URL.
agent_hints.generation_time: Typical generation: 2-5 minutes for 5-second clip. Use exponential backoff for polling.
agent_hints.credits: Each generation costs credits. Monitor via GET /credits endpoint.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Generate video from text prompt or image. Returns generation ID to poll for result.
Check generation status and get download URL when video is ready. Poll every 3-5 seconds until state=completed.

manifests.name: Mailchimp API
manifests.description_for_ai: Email marketing platform API. Manage subscriber lists, send campaigns, automate email sequences, track open rates. 500 contacts and 1000 emails/month free. Best for marketing emails and newsletters.

agent_hints.dc: Replace {dc} in base URL with your datacenter code from API key suffix e.g. key us21 → dc=us21
agent_hints.list_id: Get list IDs from GET /lists endpoint. Each 'audience' has a unique list_id.
agent_hints.double_optin: status='pending' sends confirmation email (double opt-in). 'subscribed' adds directly (use for known users).
agent_hints.tags: Use tags array to segment subscribers: ['newsletter', 'vip', 'trial']

capabilities.description_for_ai: Add or update email subscriber in a list. Use for newsletter signup, lead capture.
Send a previously created and scheduled email campaign to all subscribers. Campaign must be in 'save' or 'schedule' status.

manifests.name: Mailgun API
manifests.description_for_ai: Email API for developers. Send, receive, track emails. Email validation, inbox placement testing. 5000 emails/month free for 3 months. High deliverability. Used by GitHub, Stripe, Lyft. Use for transactional email at scale.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Send email with high deliverability. Supports HTML, attachments, tracking, tags, custom headers.
Validate email address deliverability. Returns risk score, mailbox exists check, catch-all detection.

manifests.name: Mapbox API
manifests.description_for_ai: Developer-focused mapping platform. Interactive maps, geocoding, navigation, isochrone analysis. Beautiful maps with custom styling. Used by Snapchat, Foursquare, Strava. Best for custom map UIs and navigation apps.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Forward and reverse geocoding. Address to coordinates and back. Global coverage with POI search.
Get turn-by-turn directions between two or more points. Driving, cycling, or walking. Returns route geometry and step instructions.

manifests.name: Mapillary API (Meta)
manifests.description_for_ai: Crowdsourced street-level imagery. 2B+ photos from 200+ countries. Access street photos, map features (signs, lanes, surfaces), traffic signs, sequence data. Free for developers. Use for street view, autonomous driving data, map enrichment.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Crowdsourced street-level imagery. 2B+ photos from 200+ countries. Access street photos, map features (signs, lanes, surfaces), traffic signs, sequence data. Free for developers. Use for street view, autonomous driving data, map enrichment. Search street-level images near coordinates. Returns photo IDs, camera angles, dates.

manifests.name: Mistral AI API
manifests.description_for_ai: European AI company with strong open-weight models. Best for: code generation (Codestral), multilingual European tasks, cost-efficient production. OpenAI-compatible API. Mistral Small is one of the cheapest quality models. Strong on French, German, Spanish, Italian.
manifests.cost: Mistral Small 3.1: $0.10/$0.30 per 1M tokens. Mistral Large 3: $2/$6. Codestral: $0.30/$0.90

agent_hints.openai_compat: 100% OpenAI-compatible. Change base URL to https://api.mistral.ai/v1 and swap model names. Same SDK works.
agent_hints.model_choice: mistral-small-latest for high-volume cheap tasks. mistral-large-latest for complex reasoning. codestral-latest for code.
agent_hints.european_strength: Mistral models are trained with stronger European language data — prefer over OpenAI for French/German/Spanish/Italian tasks.
agent_hints.open_source: Mistral 7B and Mixtral 8x7B are open-weight and can be self-hosted. API is for managed hosting.

capabilities.description_for_ai: OpenAI-compatible chat completions. Drop-in replacement for OpenAI API — same format, different base URL. Best for European languages and cost-efficient production.
Code-specific completion using Codestral. Optimized for 80+ programming languages. Best Mistral model for coding tasks.

manifests.name: Codestral API (Mistral)
manifests.description_for_ai: Best code completion model from Mistral. Fill-in-the-middle (FIM) completion for 80+ programming languages. Integrated in VS Code, JetBrains, Cursor. $0.30/$0.90 per 1M tokens. Use for code autocomplete, code generation, code explanation.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Fill-in-the-middle code completion. Provide code before cursor as prompt and code after cursor as suffix. Returns the missing code that fits between them. Best for IDE autocomplete integration.
Chat with Codestral for code-focused tasks: explain code, debug errors, suggest improvements, generate code from description, review code quality.

manifests.name: Mixpanel API
manifests.description_for_ai: Product analytics platform. Track user events, funnels, retention, cohorts. Understand user behavior in mobile and web apps. Used by Yelp, DocuSign, Expedia. Use for product analytics, funnel analysis, user retention tracking.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Track a user action/event in Mixpanel. Events power funnels, retention analysis, A/B tests, and user segmentation.
Export raw event data as JSONL for a date range. Returns one JSON event per line. Use for data warehousing and custom analysis.

manifests.name: Mos.ru API (Официальный сайт Москвы)
manifests.description_for_ai: Mos.ru API — official Moscow city portal data and services. Open datasets for city infrastructure: hospitals, clinics, schools, parks, sports facilities, libraries. Appointment booking integration via ЕМИАС. Part of Moscow Smart City initiative. Free for developers.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Открытые данные и сервисы официального портала Москвы. Запись к врачу, данные о городских объектах, расписания, государственные услуги Москвы. manifests.name: OpenAI API

Embeddings for semantic search. The most widely used AI API with the largest ecosystem of integrations and SDKs.
manifests.cost: GPT-4o-mini: $0.15/$0.60 per 1M tokens. GPT-5.2: $1.75/$14 per 1M tokens

agent_hints.model_choice: gpt-4o-mini for cheap tasks ($0.15/$0.60). gpt-4o for balanced quality/cost. o3-mini for complex reasoning. Use mini by default, upgrade only when quality is insufficient.
agent_hints.tool_use: Define tools as JSON Schema functions. Model decides when to call them. Essential for agentic workflows.
agent_hints.vision: Pass images as base64 or URL in message content: {type: image_url, image_url: {url: ...}}. Works with gpt-4o and gpt-4o-mini.
agent_hints.batch_api: Use Batch API for 50% discount on non-urgent tasks: submit job, get results within 24h.
agent_hints.token_counting: 1 token ≈ 4 chars in English, ≈ 2 chars in Russian/CJK. Input is cheaper than output.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Generate text responses using GPT models. The core capability — use for any text generation, answering questions, summarization, translation, code writing, analysis. Supports vision (images as input) with gpt-4o models.
Convert text to vector embeddings for semantic search, similarity comparison, and RAG. Use to find similar documents, cluster content, or build knowledge bases.
Transcribe audio to text using Whisper. Supports 50+ languages. Use for voice input, transcribing calls, processing audio files.
Generate images from text descriptions using DALL-E 3. Use for creating illustrations, product mockups, or visual content.

manifests.name: OpenAI Assistants API
manifests.description_for_ai: Build AI assistants with persistent memory, file search, and code execution. Assistants maintain conversation history, can search uploaded documents (RAG), and run Python code. Use for document Q&A chatbots, coding assistants, data analysis bots.
manifests.cost: Same as underlying model + $0.10/GB/day file storage

agent_hints.flow: 1) Create assistant once. 2) Create thread per user. 3) Add messages to thread. 4) Create run → poll until completed → get messages.
agent_hints.vs_chat: Assistants: persistent memory, file search, code execution. Chat Completions: simpler, cheaper, more control.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create an AI assistant with instructions, tools (code_interpreter, file_search), and model.
Send a message to an assistant thread and get response. Handles multi-turn conversation with memory.

manifests.name: OpenAI Batch API
manifests.description_for_ai: Process large volumes of OpenAI API requests at 50% discount. Submit batch of requests, results ready within 24 hours. Perfect for bulk classification, embedding, analysis tasks. Same models as regular API.
manifests.cost: 50% discount vs regular API. gpt-4o-mini: $0.075/$0.30 per 1M tokens

agent_hints.workflow: 1) Create JSONL file with requests. 2) Upload via /v1/files. 3) Create batch with file_id. 4) Poll /v1/batches/{id} until completed. 5) Download output file.
agent_hints.jsonl_format: Each line: {custom_id: req-1, method: POST, url: /v1/chat/completions, body: {model, messages, max_tokens}}
agent_hints.best_for: Bulk tasks where you have 1000s of items: classification, translation, embedding, extraction.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Submit batch of up to 50,000 API requests for 50% discount. Results ready within 24h. Use for bulk analysis, classification, embedding generation.

agent_hints.training_format: JSONL format: each line is {messages: [{role: system, content: ...}, {role: user, content: ...}, {role: assistant, content: ...}]}
agent_hints.min_examples: Minimum 10 examples, recommend 50-100+ for good results.
agent_hints.use_cases: Response format consistency, domain-specific knowledge, specialized tone, instruction following improvement.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Train custom versions of GPT models on your data. Better accuracy for specific tasks, consistent output format, fewer prompt tokens needed. Fine-tune gpt-4o-mini for $0.008/1K training tokens. Start fine-tuning a GPT model on custom training data. Training file must be uploaded first via Files API.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Generate image from text prompt. DALL-E 3 creates high quality photorealistic or artistic images. Returns URL or base64.

agent_hints.free: This endpoint is FREE even with paid plan. Use liberally.

agent_hints.units_tip: Use metric for most countries (Celsius). Use imperial only if user explicitly mentions Fahrenheit.
agent_hints.pop_field: In forecast, 'pop' = probability of precipitation (0.0 to 1.0). Multiply by 100 for percentage.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Control a Hue light: on/off, brightness, color (hue/saturation), color temperature, alerts.
