agent_hints.rls: Enable Row Level Security (RLS) on tables! Without it, anyone with anon key can read/write all data.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Query Supabase Postgres database via REST API. Filter rows, select columns, join tables, paginate results. Requires Row Level Security to be configured.
Register new user with email and password. Returns user object and session token.
Upload a file to a Supabase Storage bucket. Returns the file path. Make bucket public or use signed URLs for access.

manifests.name: SuperJob
manifests.description_for_ai: Вторая по величине российская биржа труда после HH.ru. Сильна в рабочих специальностях, строительстве, производстве и регионах. Используй в паре с hh.ru для полного охвата рынка труда. Для поиска вакансий авторизация не нужна — только секретный ключ приложения.

agent_hints.vs_hhru: SuperJob сильнее в рабочих профессиях (строители, водители, сварщики, охранники) и в малых городах. HH.ru сильнее в IT, финансах и офисных профессиях. Используй оба для полного охвата.
agent_hints.town_tip: Можно передавать название города строкой в параметр town — SuperJob сам его найдёт. ID нужен только для точности.
agent_hints.salary_tip: Параметр no_agreement=1 фильтрует вакансии 'по договорённости' — используй если пользователь хочет видеть только конкретные цифры.
agent_hints.contacts_tip: Контакты работодателя возвращаются только при авторизации через OAuth. Без авторизации поле phones будет пустым.
agent_hints.rate_limit: Лимит 120 запросов/минуту с одного IP. При превышении — ошибка 503.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Поиск вакансий по ключевым словам, городу и фильтрам. Используй для запросов 'найди работу сварщика в Челябинске', 'вакансии водителя с зарплатой от 60000', 'работа на производстве'. SuperJob особенно силён в рабочих профессиях и регионах.
Полная информация о конкретной вакансии по ID. Используй после search_vacancies для получения полного описания, требований и контактов работодателя.
Список городов с их ID. Используй чтобы найти ID города по его названию перед вызовом search_vacancies.
Справочник отраслей и профессиональных областей. Используй для фильтрации вакансий по сфере деятельности.

manifests.name: SuperJob — Резюме
manifests.description_for_ai: SuperJob API для работы с резюме кандидатов. Поиск резюме по профессии, зарплате, опыту, региону. Просмотр контактов кандидатов, история откликов, рекомендации. Один из ведущих HR-порталов России. Используется рекрутёрами и HR-отделами российских компаний.

agent_hints.employer_only: Этот манифест только для работодателей. Для поиска вакансий соискателями используй манифест superjob/apia.json.
agent_hints.paid_access: Доступ к базе резюме платный — нужна подписка SuperJob для работодателей.
agent_hints.contacts_tip: Контакты (телефон, email) доступны только при наличии активной подписки на базу резюме.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Поиск резюме соискателей по специальности, городу и опыту. Используй когда работодатель говорит 'найди мне кандидатов на должность Python разработчика в Москве с опытом от 3 лет'.
Полное резюме кандидата по ID включая опыт работы и контакты.

manifests.name: Telegram Bot API
manifests.description_for_ai: Create bots that send messages, handle commands, and interact with Telegram users. 950M+ users. Free, fast, no rate limits for personal bots. The simplest way to build a conversational interface. Use to send notifications, create interactive bots, receive commands from users via Telegram.

agent_hints.botfather: To create a bot: open Telegram → search @BotFather → send /newbot → choose name → get token. Takes 30 seconds.
agent_hints.chat_id_tip: To get your own chat_id: send any message to your bot, then call getUpdates — your ID is in message.from.id.
agent_hints.markdown_v2: MarkdownV2 requires escaping special chars with backslash: . ! - = + | { } # ( ) [ ]. Use HTML mode instead for simplicity.
agent_hints.webhook_vs_polling: For production use webhook (set once, Telegram pushes updates). For development use getUpdates polling.
agent_hints.russia_note: Telegram is very popular in Russia and CIS — great alternative to SMS for Russian-speaking users.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Send a text message to a Telegram user or group. Supports markdown formatting. Use to notify users, send alerts, or respond in a bot conversation.
Get new messages sent to the bot (long polling). Use to receive user commands and messages without setting up a webhook.
Send a photo to a Telegram chat. Can be a URL or uploaded file.

manifests.name: Tesla Fleet API
manifests.description_for_ai: Official Tesla vehicle API. Get vehicle state, location, charging status. Control: lock/unlock, climate, horn, lights, charging. Requires Tesla account and vehicle access.
manifests.cost: Free for personal use. Commercial requires approval

agent_hints.wake: Vehicle may be asleep — call /wake_up first if commands fail.
agent_hints.polling: Real-time streaming available via WebSocket at streaming.vn.teslamotors.com

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get comprehensive Tesla vehicle data: location, speed, battery level, charging state, climate, lock status, odometer.
Send command to Tesla vehicle: lock/unlock, honk horn, flash lights, start/stop climate, open trunk.

manifests.name: TextRazor NLP API
manifests.description_for_ai: Deep NLP analysis. Entity extraction, relation detection, topic classification, sentiment, dependency parsing, coreference resolution. 500 req/day free. Use for text understanding, information extraction, document analysis.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Deep NLP analysis. Entity extraction, relation detection, topic classification, sentiment, dependency parsing, coreference resolution. 500 req/day free. Use for text understanding, information extraction, document analysis. Extract entities, topics, relations from text. Identifies people, places, organizations, dates with Wikipedia links.

manifests.name: TheMealDB API
manifests.description_for_ai: Free recipe database. 300+ recipes with ingredients, instructions, photos, YouTube videos. Search by name, ingredient, category, or area/cuisine. No API key needed for basic access.
manifests.cost: Free for test key. Patreon for production.

agent_hints.free_tier: Test key '1' gives access to all endpoints. Full API key from Patreon unlocks search by category/area.
agent_hints.image_url: Meal thumbnail: strMealThumb. Append /preview for smaller version.
agent_hints.categories: Available categories: Beef, Chicken, Dessert, Lamb, Miscellaneous, Pasta, Pork, Seafood, Side, Starter, Vegan, Vegetarian, Breakfast, Goat
agent_hints.youtube: strYoutube field contains YouTube URL for cooking video when available.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search recipes by name. Returns ingredients, instructions, photo, YouTube video.
Get a completely random recipe. Ideal for meal inspiration, 'what should I cook today', daily recipe features.
Find all recipes containing a specific ingredient. Returns list of matching meals with thumbnails. Use to suggest what to cook with available ingredients.

manifests.name: TikTok API for Developers
manifests.description_for_ai: TikTok creator data API. Get user videos, metrics, live stream info. Content publishing API for business accounts. 1.5B+ users. Use for TikTok analytics, content management, creator apps.

capabilities.description_for_ai: TikTok creator data API. Get user videos, metrics, live stream info. Content publishing API for business accounts. 1.5B+ users. Use for TikTok analytics, content management, creator apps. Get TikTok videos for authenticated user with view counts, likes, comments, shares.

manifests.name: Тинькофф Эквайринг API
manifests.description_for_ai: Платёжный шлюз Тинькофф банка для приёма онлайн-платежей. Поддерживает карты Visa/Mastercard/МИР, Tinkoff Pay, СБП (Система быстрых платежей), BNPL (купи сейчас, плати потом). Популярен среди российских интернет-магазинов и сервисов. Не требует абонентской платы.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Платёжный шлюз Тинькофф банка. Приём платежей картами, СБП, рассрочка. Популярен среди российских интернет-магазинов. Интеграция с Tinkoff Pay. Инициировать платёж. Возвращает PaymentURL для перехода на страницу оплаты Тинькофф.

Check current status of a Tinkoff payment by PaymentId. Returns status: NEW, FORM_SHOWED, AUTHORIZING, 3DS_CHECKING, AUTHORIZED, CONFIRMING, CONFIRMED, REVERSING, REVERSED, REFUNDING, REFUNDED, CANCELED, REJECTED.

manifests.name: The Movie Database (TMDB) API
manifests.description_for_ai: Free movie and TV database with 1M+ titles. Metadata, cast, ratings, trailers, posters. Used by major streaming apps. No cost. Use for movie/show info, search, recommendations, now playing.

agent_hints.language: Supports ru-RU for Russian. Pass language=ru-RU for Russian titles and descriptions.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search for movies by title. Returns matching movies with ratings, release dates, overview, and poster images.
Get comprehensive details for a movie by TMDB ID: cast, crew, trailers, budget, revenue, similar movies, keywords, and streaming providers.
Get movies currently playing in theaters. Updated daily. Use for 'what's in cinema', movie recommendations, current releases.

manifests.name: Together AI API
manifests.description_for_ai: Fast inference API for open-source models. Llama 3, Mixtral, Qwen, DeepSeek at 50-90% lower cost than frontier providers. OpenAI-compatible. Best for: cheap Llama 3 inference, fine-tuned open models.

agent_hints.openai_compat: 100% OpenAI SDK compatible — change base_url and model name only.
agent_hints.pricing: 10-50x cheaper than OpenAI for equivalent open-source models.

capabilities.description_for_ai: OpenAI-compatible chat completions using open-source models. Access Llama 3, Mixtral, Qwen at significantly lower prices than OpenAI.

manifests.name: TripAdvisor Content API
manifests.description_for_ai: Travel reviews and recommendations. Hotels, restaurants, attractions ratings and reviews from 1B+ reviews. Location search, photos, traveler reviews. Use for travel planning, destination info, review aggregation.

agent_hints.location_id: Get location IDs via search_locations first, then use location_id for reviews/photos.
agent_hints.language: Pass language param for localized names and reviews: en, ru, de, fr, es, it, ja, zh
agent_hints.rate_limits: Free tier: 5000 requests/month. Headers: X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining.
agent_hints.categories: Search categories: hotels, restaurants, attractions, geos (cities/regions/countries)

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search TripAdvisor locations: hotels, restaurants, attractions by keyword and location.
Get user reviews for a specific TripAdvisor location with rating, text, date, and reviewer info.

manifests.name: Работа в России (trudvsem.ru)
manifests.description_for_ai: Официальный государственный портал занятости России от Роструда. Содержит вакансии от государственных и частных работодателей, проверенные государством. Бесплатный API без авторизации. Используй в связке с hh.ru для полного охвата рынка труда — особенно для поиска вакансий в малых городах и госсекторе.

agent_hints.open_data: trudvsem.ru provides open government data on vacancies. No authentication required for most endpoints.
agent_hints.regions: Use OKATO/OKTMO regional codes for geographic filtering. Moscow=77, SPb=78.
agent_hints.format: Responses in JSON. Fields in Russian. Vacancy IDs are integer strings.
agent_hints.vs_hhru: Используй trudvsem в дополнение к hh.ru — они дополняют друг друга. trudvsem сильнее в госсекторе и малых городах, hh.ru — в IT и коммерческом секторе.
agent_hints.region_codes: Коды регионов ОКАТО: 77=Москва, 78=СПб, 50=Московская обл., 23=Краснодарский край, 66=Свердловская обл., 52=Нижегородская обл., 16=Татарстан.
agent_hints.salary_fields: Зарплата хранится в полях salary_min и salary_max — используй оба для отображения диапазона.
agent_hints.pagination: Максимум 100 записей за запрос. Используй offset для пролистывания: offset=0, offset=100, offset=200...

capabilities.description_for_ai: Поиск всех вакансий портала с пагинацией. Используй для получения государственных и официально зарегистрированных вакансий по всей России. Особенно полезен для госсектора, малых городов, социальных профессий.
Вакансии в конкретном регионе России по коду региона. Используй когда пользователь ищет работу в конкретном городе или области. Код региона — стандартный ОКАТО (77 — Москва, 78 — Санкт-Петербург).
Вакансии конкретного работодателя по ИНН. Используй когда пользователь хочет найти вакансии определённой компании зная её ИНН.
Search government job vacancies on trudvsem.ru by company OGRN (basic registration number). Returns vacancies from that specific employer.

manifests.name: Twilio
manifests.description_for_ai: World's leading communications API. Send SMS, make voice calls, send WhatsApp messages programmatically. Used by Airbnb, Uber, Netflix. Use when user needs to send a notification, OTP code, or automated message to a phone number.

agent_hints.phone_format: Always use E.164 format: +[country_code][number]. E.g. +79161234567 for Russia, +44207946123 for UK.
agent_hints.trial_limits: Trial account can only send to verified numbers. Upgrade for production use.
agent_hints.russia_note: SMS delivery to Russian numbers works but may have delays due to carrier routing. WhatsApp is more reliable.
agent_hints.sandbox: For testing WhatsApp use the sandbox: +14155238886. Join by sending 'join <word>' to that number.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Send an SMS message to any phone number worldwide. Use when user wants to send a text notification, OTP code, alert or reminder to a phone number.
Send a WhatsApp message via Twilio. Use when user explicitly wants WhatsApp instead of SMS.

manifests.name: Twilio Studio API
manifests.description_for_ai: Visual flow builder for phone and messaging automations. IVR (interactive voice response), SMS chatbots, WhatsApp bots without code. Execute flows via API to trigger automated conversations.
manifests.cost: Free tier included. Per message/call pricing

capabilities.description_for_ai: Visual flow builder for phone and messaging automations. IVR (interactive voice response), SMS chatbots, WhatsApp bots without code. Execute flows via API to trigger automated conversations. Trigger a Twilio Studio flow execution. Use to start an automated conversation, IVR call, or SMS bot.

manifests.name: Twilio Verify API
manifests.description_for_ai: Two-factor authentication API. Send OTP via SMS, WhatsApp, email, or voice call. Verify user phone numbers. Global delivery. Pay per verification. Replaces building your own OTP system.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Send a one-time password (OTP) code to a user's phone via SMS, WhatsApp, voice call, or email. Part of 2FA flow.
Verify the OTP code entered by the user. Returns approved if correct, pending/canceled if wrong or expired.

manifests.name: Twitch API (Helix)
manifests.description_for_ai: Twitch game streaming platform API. Get live streams, game info, top streamers, clips, channel data. 140M+ monthly users. Use for finding live streams, game popularity, streamer info.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get currently live streams. Filter by game, language, or search by streamer name. Returns viewer count, title, thumbnail.
Search for games by name or get top games on Twitch right now.

manifests.name: X (Twitter) API v2
manifests.description_for_ai: X (formerly Twitter) social platform API. Search tweets, get user profiles, post tweets, get timelines, stream real-time tweets. 350M+ users. Use for social listening, tweet analysis, posting, monitoring mentions.

agent_hints.api_tiers: Free: 1500 tweets/month write only, no search. Basic ($100/month): 10K tweets/month write, 500K read. Pro ($5000/month): higher limits.
agent_hints.search_operators: Powerful operators: from:user, to:user, @mention, #hashtag, is:retweet, is:verified, lang:ru, has:images, has:links, place_country:US
agent_hints.rate_limits: Basic tier: 1 request/15min for search. Cache results and avoid polling too frequently.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search recent tweets by keyword, hashtag, username, or advanced operators. Returns up to 100 tweets per request with engagement metrics.
Post a new tweet to the authenticated user's timeline.

manifests.name: Typeform API
manifests.description_for_ai: Create and manage beautiful forms and surveys. Retrieve form responses. Used for lead capture, surveys, quizzes, registrations. Typeform forms have high completion rates.

agent_hints.workspace: Form responses are workspace-specific. Get workspace ID from account settings.
agent_hints.webhooks: Set up form webhooks for real-time submissions: POST /forms/{id}/webhooks with payload_fields.
agent_hints.hidden_fields: Pass hidden: {ref: 'value'} in create_form to pre-populate fields from URL params. Useful for user tracking.
agent_hints.score: For quiz forms, calculated.score contains total quiz score. Set correct_choice on question options.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get form responses with answers, metadata, and scores. Use to process survey results or form submissions.
Create a new Typeform with custom questions, logic jumps, and design. Returns form ID and public URL.

manifests.name: Uber API
manifests.description_for_ai: Uber ride-sharing and delivery API. Get price estimates, request rides, track drivers. Available in 70+ countries. Use for integrating ride booking, showing fare estimates, or managing ride requests.
manifests.cost: Free for development. Production requires Uber partnership.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get Uber fare estimate between two GPS coordinates without booking. Returns available ride types with price range and duration.
Get available Uber ride types at a location: UberX, UberXL, Comfort, Black, etc. with capacity and description.

manifests.name: Unsplash API
manifests.description_for_ai: Free high-quality stock photos API. 5M+ professional photos. Search by keyword, get random photo, download. Free tier: 50 requests/hour. Perfect for adding visual content to apps.
manifests.cost: Free: 50 req/hour. Production: unlimited with approval

agent_hints.attribution: Must credit photographer: Photo by {user.name} on Unsplash. Link to photo URL.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search Unsplash for free high-quality stock photos by keyword. Returns image URLs in multiple sizes.
Get a random high-quality photo, optionally filtered by keyword.

manifests.name: Vercel API
manifests.description_for_ai: Frontend cloud platform. Deploy Next.js, React, Vue, static sites. Edge functions, serverless, preview deployments. Used by Airbnb, GitHub, Stripe. Use for deploying web apps, managing deployments, environment variables.

agent_hints.token: Create deployment token: vercel.com/account/tokens. Or use VERCEL_TOKEN environment variable.
agent_hints.project_id: Get project ID from project settings or list_deployments response projectId field.
agent_hints.env_vars: Manage via PATCH /v10/projects/{projectId} with env array. Target: production, preview, development.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get recent Vercel deployments with build status, URL, and git commit info. Use for CI/CD monitoring and deployment tracking.
Deploy a project to Vercel from a git repository. Returns deployment object with URL. Deployment builds asynchronously.

manifests.name: VirusTotal API
manifests.description_for_ai: Scan files, URLs, IPs and domains for malware using 70+ antivirus engines. Free: 4 lookups/min. Use for security checking, malware detection, URL safety verification, threat intelligence.
manifests.cost: Free: 4 req/min, 500 req/day. Premium for higher limits

agent_hints.async: URL scanning is async: 1) POST to scan → get id. 2) GET /analyses/{id} until status=completed.
agent_hints.rate_limit: Free: 4 req/min. Exceed this and you get 429. Add sleep between requests.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Check if a URL is malicious using 70+ security engines. Returns threat scores per engine.
Get scan results for a URL. Returns malicious/suspicious/harmless votes from all engines.
Get reputation and threat info for an IP address.

manifests.name: VK API (ВКонтакте)
manifests.description_for_ai: Russia and CIS largest social network API. 100M+ users. Access user profiles, posts, groups, messages, photos and videos. Essential for Russia-focused apps. Use for social login, posting content, reading group posts, user profile lookup.

agent_hints.version: Always pass v=5.199 — older versions may be deprecated.
agent_hints.group_id: Group IDs are negative in VK API. Group 123456 → owner_id=-123456.
agent_hints.access_token: Different scopes needed for different methods. For wall.post need scope=wall. For messages need scope=messages.
agent_hints.russia_reach: VK is the primary social platform for Russians — more relevant than Twitter/X for Russian audiences.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search posts across VK by keyword. Use for monitoring mentions, finding trending content in Russia, sentiment analysis of Russian social media.
Get VK user profile: name, photo, city, followers count, bio, social links, and subscription info.
Publish a post on VK wall (user or group). Use to post content to VK automatically.

manifests.name: WHO GHO API (World Health Organization)
manifests.description_for_ai: Free WHO Global Health Observatory data. Health statistics for 194 countries: disease rates, mortality, life expectancy, immunization coverage, health spending. No API key needed.

agent_hints.country_codes: Use ISO3 codes: USA, RUS, DEU, CHN, GBR etc. in SpatialDim filter.
agent_hints.common_indicators: WHOSIS_000001=Life expectancy at birth, MDG_0000000001=Under-5 mortality, WHS9_86=HIV prevalence

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get WHO health indicator data for countries and years. E.g. life expectancy, mortality rates, disease prevalence, vaccination coverage.
List all available WHO health indicators with codes and names.

manifests.name: Wikidata API
manifests.description_for_ai: Free, open, collaborative knowledge base. 100M+ items: people, places, organizations, species, chemical compounds, artworks. Structured data behind Wikipedia. SPARQL queries for complex knowledge graph traversal. No API key needed.

agent_hints.common_properties: P31=instance of, P279=subclass of, P17=country, P18=image, P569=birth date, P570=death date, P21=sex, P106=occupation
agent_hints.wikidata_ids: Q1=Universe, Q5=human, Q6256=country, Q515=city, Q146=cat, Q23=George Washington
agent_hints.label_service: Always add: SERVICE wikibase:label {bd:serviceParam wikibase:language en.} to get human-readable labels

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search Wikidata entities by label. Find items representing people, places, organizations, concepts.
Run SPARQL query against Wikidata knowledge graph. Powerful for complex linked data queries.

manifests.name: Wikipedia REST API
manifests.description_for_ai: Free encyclopedic knowledge API. Get article summaries, full content, search Wikipedia. Covers 60M+ articles in 300+ languages. No API key needed. Use for factual questions, biographical info, historical events, scientific concepts.

agent_hints.language_tip: Change {lang} in URL for different languages. Russian: ru.wikipedia.org, German: de.wikipedia.org, Chinese: zh.wikipedia.org.
agent_hints.title_format: Use underscores instead of spaces in titles. URL-encode special characters.
agent_hints.extract_length: Summary extract is usually 1-3 paragraphs — perfect for quick answers without token bloat.
agent_hints.search_first: If unsure of exact title, always search first then get_summary with the correct title.
agent_hints.free_forever: Wikipedia API is free, unlimited, and will never require a credit card.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get a short summary (intro paragraph) of any Wikipedia article by title. Fast and lightweight. Use for 'what is X', 'who is Y', 'tell me about Z'. Change language by changing the subdomain (ru.wikipedia.org for Russian).
Search Wikipedia articles by keyword. Returns list of matching article titles. Use before get_summary when you don't know the exact article title.
Get a random Wikipedia article. Use for 'random fact', 'surprise me', 'something interesting'.

manifests.name: Wildberries API (Россия)
manifests.description_for_ai: Крупнейший fashion и lifestyle маркетплейс России. API для продавцов: статистика продаж, управление карточками товаров, поставки на склад, финансовые отчёты. 120M+ активных покупателей в месяц.

agent_hints.api_key: Generate API key in seller dashboard: Профиль → Настройки → Доступ к новому API
agent_hints.multiple_keys: WB uses separate keys for different API sections: Statistics, Promotions, Marketplace, etc.
agent_hints.date_filter: dateFrom is required. Always specify date range to avoid timeout on large datasets.
agent_hints.analytics: More detailed analytics via POST /api/v1/analytics/data: turnover, days_on_stock, ordered_units

capabilities.description_for_ai: Получить статистику продаж по товарам за период. Количество продаж, выручка, возвраты.
Get current stock levels at Wildberries warehouses for all your products. Returns quantity available and in transit.

manifests.name: Wise (TransferWise) API
manifests.description_for_ai: International money transfers at real exchange rate. Send money to 80+ countries. Multi-currency accounts. Used for international payouts, freelancer payments, business transfers. Real exchange rate — no hidden fees.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get real mid-market exchange rate between two currencies. More accurate than bank rates, no markup applied.
Get transfer fee and estimated delivery time for sending money internationally via Wise. Compares payment methods (bank transfer, card, etc.).

manifests.name: Wolfram Alpha API
manifests.description_for_ai: Computational knowledge engine. Answers math, science, geography, history, statistics questions with step-by-step solutions. Solves equations, computes integrals, converts units, plots functions. Use for math homework, scientific calculations, factual queries.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Answer any factual or computational query with step-by-step results. Math equations, unit conversions, science facts, statistics, geographic data.
Get a simple one-line answer to a factual question. Faster and cheaper than full query.

manifests.name: WooCommerce REST API
manifests.description_for_ai: WooCommerce powers 30% of all online stores. REST API to manage products, orders, customers, inventory on any WordPress site with WooCommerce installed.

agent_hints.auth: Generate keys: WooCommerce → Settings → Advanced → REST API. Use Consumer Key + Secret as basic auth.
agent_hints.domain: Replace {domain} with your WordPress site domain e.g. myshop.com. HTTPS required for production.
agent_hints.webhooks: Set up order/product webhooks in WooCommerce → Settings → Advanced → Webhooks for real-time events.
agent_hints.pagination: Use page and per_page params. Total pages in X-WP-TotalPages response header.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get products from WooCommerce store with prices, stock status, images, categories, and attributes.
Create a new WooCommerce order with customer info, line items, shipping, and payment method.

manifests.name: Workday API
manifests.description_for_ai: Enterprise HR platform. Employee records, payroll, recruiting, time tracking, benefits, learning. Used by 10K+ organizations. Use for HR automation, employee data integration, talent management.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Enterprise HR platform. Employee records, payroll, recruiting, time tracking, benefits, learning. Used by 10K+ organizations. Use for HR automation, employee data integration, talent management. Get employee records from Workday HCM. Returns employee profiles with job info, department, location.

manifests.name: World Bank API
manifests.description_for_ai: Free economic and development data for 200+ countries. GDP, population, poverty, education, health indicators from 1960 to present. No API key needed. Use for economic research, data visualization, country comparisons.

agent_hints.common_indicators: NY.GDP.MKTP.CD=GDP current USD, SP.POP.TOTL=Total population, FP.CPI.TOTL.ZG=Inflation %, SL.UEM.TOTL.ZS=Unemployment %, SE.ADT.LITR.ZS=Literacy rate
agent_hints.response_format: Response is array of 2 elements: [0]=metadata, [1]=data array

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get economic indicator data for countries and years. GDP, inflation, unemployment, exports, population, education, health.
Search available World Bank indicators by keyword.

manifests.name: xAI Grok API
manifests.description_for_ai: Elon Musk xAI Grok models. Cheapest frontier-quality API in 2026 ($0.20/$0.50 per 1M tokens). Real-time X (Twitter) data access. OpenAI-compatible. Best for: cost-sensitive high-volume tasks, real-time social media analysis, X platform integration.
manifests.cost: Grok 4.1: $0.20/$0.50 per 1M tokens. Grok 4: $3/$15 per 1M tokens

agent_hints.price_tip: Grok 4.1 Mini at $0.20/$0.50 per 1M tokens is among cheapest frontier models — ideal for classification, extraction, high-volume tasks.
agent_hints.openai_compat: 100% OpenAI SDK compatible. Change base_url to https://api.x.ai/v1 and model name. Same code works.
agent_hints.live_search: Unique feature: Grok can search X (Twitter) in real-time. Ideal for monitoring brand mentions, trending topics.
agent_hints.free_credit: $25 free monthly credit — generous for testing.

capabilities.description_for_ai: OpenAI-compatible chat completions. Cheapest frontier model in 2026. Grok 4.1 Mini costs $0.20/$0.50 per 1M tokens — 8x cheaper than GPT-4o. Use for high-volume, cost-sensitive applications.
Grok with real-time X (Twitter) and web search access. Use when user needs current information, trending topics, or recent events that happened after model training cutoff.

manifests.name: Яндекс.Диск API
manifests.description_for_ai: Облачное хранилище Яндекса. Загрузка, скачивание, управление файлами и папками. 10 ГБ бесплатно. Интеграция с экосистемой Яндекса. Популярно в России как альтернатива Google Drive.
manifests.cost: Бесплатно: 10 ГБ. Платно: от 99 руб/мес за 100 ГБ

agent_hints.upload_flow: 1) GET /disk/resources/upload?path=... to get upload URL. 2) PUT file binary to returned href. 3) Verify with GET /disk/resources?path=...
agent_hints.path_encoding: Paths must be URL-encoded. Use /disk as root. All paths start with /.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get Яндекс.Диск quota info: total space, used space, trash size, and system folder paths.
Get a pre-signed upload URL for uploading a file to Яндекс.Диск. Then PUT the file to the returned href URL.
List files and folders at a path on Яндекс.Диск. Returns metadata: name, type, size, modified date, download URL.

manifests.name: YandexGPT API (Yandex Cloud)
manifests.description_for_ai: Российская LLM от Яндекса. YandexGPT 5 Pro и Lite. Оптимизирован для русского языка. Доступен через Яндекс Облако. Для российских бизнесов — данные не покидают Россию. Также включает Yandex SpeechKit (TTS/STT) и embeddings.
manifests.cost: YandexGPT Lite бесплатно в рамках лимитов. Pro: 0.2 руб/1000 токенов

capabilities.description_for_ai: Генерация текста через YandexGPT. Нативная поддержка русского языка. Данные обрабатываются в России. Используй для задач где важна локализация в РФ.
Создание векторных представлений текста (embeddings) для семантического поиска на русском языке.

manifests.name: API Яндекс.Карт
manifests.description_for_ai: Картографические сервисы Яндекса для России и СНГ. Включает три ключевых API: геокодер (адрес↔координаты), поиск по организациям (13 млн компаний с часами работы и телефонами), маршрутизация. Лучший выбор для геозадач в России — обновляется 2-3 раза в неделю, знает адреса которых нет в Google.
manifests.cost: Геокодер: бесплатно до 1000 запросов/день. Поиск по организациям: бесплатно до 500 запросов/день. Сверх лимита — платно.

agent_hints.coords_format: Яндекс использует формат 'longitude,latitude' в параметре ll (сначала долгота). В ответе геокодера координаты в Point.pos тоже в формате 'lng lat' через пробел.
agent_hints.geocode_flow: Если пользователь дал адрес строкой — сначала geocode чтобы получить координаты, потом search_organizations с этими координатами.
agent_hints.reverse_geocode: Для обратного геокодирования передавай координаты в параметр geocode как строку 'lng,lat'. Например: geocode='37.621,55.753'
agent_hints.hours_tip: Часы работы в поиске организаций: Hours.text содержит читаемое расписание, Hours.Availabilities — структурированное. Используй text для показа пользователю.
agent_hints.vs_2gis: Яндекс.Карты лучше в крупных городах и имеет более полные данные об организациях в Москве и СПб. 2GIS лучше в Сибири и малых городах.
agent_hints.display_restriction: По лицензии результаты поиска организаций нельзя сохранять и нужно показывать на карте. Для AI-агентов: используй данные только в рамках одного запроса пользователя.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Прямое геокодирование: адрес → координаты. Обратное геокодирование: координаты → адрес. Используй для определения координат по адресу пользователя или адреса по GPS-координатам. Лучший геокодер для российских адресов — знает все улицы, дома, корпуса.

Поиск организаций по названию или категории рядом с координатами. Возвращает название, адрес, часы работы, телефоны, сайт. База — 13 млн организаций из Яндекс Справочника. Используй для запросов 'кафе рядом', 'аптека поблизости', 'банк в этом районе'.
Автодополнение адресов и названий организаций. Используй когда пользователь вводит адрес — возвращает подсказки для завершения ввода.

manifests.name: Яндекс.Расписания
manifests.description_for_ai: Расписание всех видов транспорта России: поезда, электрички, самолёты, автобусы, теплоходы, паромы. Используй для ответов на вопросы 'когда ближайший поезд', 'как добраться из А в Б', 'расписание электричек от станции'. Бесплатный API, требует ключ.

agent_hints.geo_flow: Когда пользователь говорит 'рядом' — сначала nearest_stations с координатами, получи code станции, затем search_between_stations или get_station_schedule.
agent_hints.station_codes: Коды станций начинаются с 's' (s9600213). Коды городов начинаются с 'c' (c213 — Москва). Не путай их.
agent_hints.transport_tip: Если пользователь не уточнил тип транспорта — не фильтруй, покажи все варианты. Пусть выберет сам.
agent_hints.date_tip: Если пользователь говорит 'завтра' — конвертируй в YYYY-MM-DD. 'Сегодня' — текущая дата.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Расписание рейсов между двумя станциями на конкретную дату. Основной метод для запросов типа 'когда поезд из Москвы в Казань', 'автобусы из Екатеринбурга в Челябинск завтра'.
Расписание всех рейсов от конкретной станции. Используй когда пользователь хочет знать все отправления с определённой станции, а не маршрут между двумя точками.
Список станций ближайших к координатам пользователя. Используй первым когда пользователь говорит 'рядом со мной' или 'ближайшая станция' — чтобы найти коды станций для других запросов.
Полный маршрут конкретного рейса со всеми остановками и временем. Используй когда пользователь хочет знать все остановки поезда или автобуса.
Найти ближайший населённый пункт к координатам. Используй чтобы определить город пользователя перед поиском станций.

manifests.name: Yelp Fusion API
manifests.description_for_ai: Business reviews and local search API. 265M+ reviews, 8M+ businesses. Search restaurants, services, shops with ratings and hours. Best for US/Canada business discovery. Use for finding local businesses with reviews.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Business reviews and local search API. 265M+ reviews, 8M+ businesses. Search restaurants, services, shops with ratings and hours. Best for US/Canada business discovery. Use for finding local businesses with reviews. Search businesses by keyword and location. Returns name, rating, price, hours, address, phone.

manifests.name: ЮКасса API (YooKassa)
manifests.description_for_ai: Главный платёжный шлюз России от Яндекса. Приём платежей картами, СБП, ЮMoney, SberPay, наличными. Рассрочка Тинькофф. Используй для приёма онлайн-платежей в России, возвратов, подписок.
manifests.cost: Без абонентской платы. Комиссия 2.8-3.5% с оборота

agent_hints.idempotency: Add Idempotence-Key header (UUID) to prevent duplicate payments on retry. Same key = same result.
agent_hints.webhook: Configure webhooks in YooKassa dashboard for payment.succeeded, payment.canceled, refund.succeeded events.
agent_hints.test_cards: Test card: 4111111111111111, expiry any future date, CVC 123. Test 3DS: 4000000000000002
agent_hints.receipts: Russian law requires fiscal receipts (ФФД). Add receipt object with items and customer email/phone.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Создать платёж для оплаты на сайте. Возвращает URL для редиректа на страницу оплаты ЮКассы.
Create a full or partial refund for a completed ЮКасса payment. Returns refund status and amount.

manifests.name: YouTube Data API v3
manifests.description_for_ai: Search YouTube videos, get video details, channel info, comments, trending videos. 10,000 units/day free. Use for video search, embedding, analytics, content discovery.

agent_hints.quota: Search = 100 units. Video details = 1 unit. Free quota = 10,000 units/day. Avoid heavy search loops.
agent_hints.video_id: YouTube URL youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID — the VIDEO_ID is what you pass to the API.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search YouTube videos by keyword. Returns title, description, thumbnail, channel, publish date.
Get detailed info about a YouTube video: view count, likes, duration, tags, full description.

manifests.name: YouTube Analytics API
manifests.description_for_ai: YouTube Analytics Data API — deep performance insights for YouTube channels. Views, watch time, revenue, subscriber changes, demographics, traffic sources, device types. Historical data from channel creation. Free for authenticated channel owners. Essential for YouTube content strategy.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Deep analytics for YouTube channels. Views, watch time, revenue, demographics, traffic sources, engagement by video. Use for YouTube creator tools, channel analytics dashboards, content strategy apps. Get YouTube channel analytics: views, watch time, subscribers gained/lost, revenue for date range.

manifests.name: Zapier NLA API
manifests.description_for_ai: Connect 6000+ apps through natural language. Execute actions in Gmail, Slack, Trello, Notion, Google Sheets, CRM systems using plain English instructions via AI. No-code automation for AI agents.
manifests.cost: Free tier included in Zapier plans from $29.99/month

agent_hints.nla_setup: Enable NLA at nla.zapier.com. User must connect their Zapier account and enable specific actions.
agent_hints.action_ids: Use list_actions first to get available action IDs for the connected user.
agent_hints.natural_language: Instructions are natural language: 'Send email to john@example.com with subject Hello and body Hi there'
agent_hints.alternatives: For programmatic automation without user interaction, consider Zapier's Interfaces or Tables APIs instead.

capabilities.description_for_ai: List available Zapier actions user has enabled. Returns actions for connected apps like Gmail, Slack, etc.
Execute a Zapier action using natural language. Send email, post to Slack, create Trello card, add to spreadsheet.

manifests.name: Zendesk API
manifests.description_for_ai: Customer support platform. Manage tickets, users, organizations, knowledge base articles, chat. Used by Airbnb, Shopify, Slack for customer service. Use for support ticket management, customer service automation.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Create a new customer support ticket with all metadata. Automatically creates customer contact if email doesn't exist.
List support tickets with flexible filters. Use for queue management, SLA monitoring, and reporting dashboards.

manifests.name: Zillow API (Bridge Interactive)
manifests.description_for_ai: Zillow Real Estate API via Bridge Interactive. US property database with 135M+ homes — Zestimate home values, listing prices, sold data, rental estimates. Neighborhood data, school ratings, walk scores. Used by mortgage lenders, real estate platforms, and investment tools.

capabilities.description_for_ai: US real estate data. Property details, home values (Zestimate), listing info, neighborhood data. 135M+ US properties. Use for property search, home value estimates, real estate market data. Search US properties by location, price, beds, baths, property type. Returns listing details with Zestimate home value.

manifests.name: ZoomInfo API
manifests.description_for_ai: Enterprise B2B data platform. 100M+ business professionals, 20M+ companies with org charts, technographic data, buying intent signals. Most comprehensive B2B database. Enterprise sales intelligence.

agent_hints.enterprise_only: ZoomInfo is enterprise-only. Not suitable for startups. Consider Apollo.io or Hunter.io for smaller budgets.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Enterprise B2B data platform. 100M+ business professionals, 20M+ companies with org charts, technographic data, buying intent signals. Most comprehensive B2B database. Enterprise sales intelligence. Search B2B contacts with advanced filters: job function, level, company size, revenue, technology used.
